reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the person who won the FIA World Endurance Championship in 2013.
2. Using that person, determine who drove the Toyota TF101 with them.
original_final_question: The winner of the FIA World Endurance Championship in 2013 drove the Toyota TF101 with who? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Who won the FIA World Endurance Championship in 2013? Evidence: Allan McNish: He won the FIA World Endurance Championship (FIA WEC) in 2013. -> Allan McNish

Node 2: Who drove the Toyota TF101 with Allan McNish? Evidence: Toyota TF101: The car was designed by Toyota F1's chief of chassis Jean-Claude Martens and was driven by Mika Salo and Allan McNish. -> Mika Salo
